name: Desktop Commander
description_en: Gives Claude terminal control with filesystem search and edit across your machine—run commands, manage processes, and read or modify files.
description_zh: 赋予 Claude 终端控制能力,并可在本机搜索与编辑文件系统——执行命令、管理进程、读写文件。
long_en: Desktop Commander is an MCP server that bridges the model to a real shell and the local filesystem, enabling long-running commands, code edits, and process management from a conversation.
long_zh: Desktop Commander 是把模型连接到真实 shell 与本地文件系统的 MCP 服务,可在对话中执行长任务命令、编辑代码并管理进程。
sec_note_en: Grants full terminal and filesystem access—high capability; review scope and run only on machines you trust.
sec_note_zh: 授予完整的终端与文件系统访问权限——能力很高;请审阅权限范围,仅在可信机器上运行。
